task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Scheduled Reports' system feature is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Vicidial Admin interface, under System Settings, the 'Scheduled Reports' option should be set to '1' or enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a scheduled report with ID 'DAILY_LOG' and Description 'Daily Compliance Export'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration form or list in the Vicidial interface showing a scheduled report with Scheduled ID 'DAILY_LOG' and Description 'Daily Compliance Export'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the selected Report is 'Export Calls Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scheduled report configuration for 'DAILY_LOG', the 'Report' dropdown or field is set to 'Export Calls Report'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Run Time is set to '0200'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scheduled report configuration, the 'Run Time' field is set to '0200'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Email is 'compliance@valleyhealth.org' and Email Subject is 'Daily Call Export'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scheduled report configuration, the 'Email' field contains 'compliance@valleyhealth.org' and the 'Email Subject' field contains 'Daily Call Export'.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vicidial admin web pages being navigated and forms being filled out, not terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually submitted the forms and saved the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for confirmation messages (e.g., 'SUCCESS', 'Report Added') in the Vicidial interface, or the new report appearing in the saved list of scheduled reports.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not just type the required values into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values must be entered into the actual input fields of the Vicidial web application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target scheduled report must have Scheduled ID 'DAILY_LOG', Report 'Export Calls Report' (internal ID 'export_calls_report'), Email 'compliance@valleyhealth.org', Run Time '0200', and Subject 'Daily Call Export'. The 'Scheduled Reports' system feature must be enabled in the Vicidial settings.
